description: Features: This Wax Shoe Polish contains Beeswax and Carnauba Wax to protect and provides long lasting polish shines. Clean and protect shoe colours, preserve the leather with essential nutrients and refreshes appearance. Benefits: It will prolong the life span of your favourite leather boots and shoes. It cleans, preserves, water-proof, polishes and restores a rich colours to faded shoes and leather gear.
